vulnerabilities.description: No usage of Helmet middleware for setting security-related HTTP headers.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet middleware to secure HTTP headers in your Express application.

vulnerabilities.description: CORS configuration not present, which may lead to unauthorized access from untrusted origins.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement CORS middleware with a properly configured whitelist for allowed origins.

vulnerabilities.description: Rate limiting is not implemented, which could lead to denial of service attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Integrate rate-limiting middleware to control the number of requests the server can handle in a specific timeframe.

vulnerabilities.description: Input sanitization is not explicitly shown, raising the risk of possible injection attacks.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure that all user inputs are sanitized and validated before processing them.

vulnerabilities.description: Secrets might be logged if they are included in error messages or caught exceptions.
vulnerabilities.fix: Review logging mechanism to ensure sensitive information is not logged.

vulnerabilities.description: JWT/OAuth2 configuration for authentication is not detailed, raising concerns about the security of token management.
vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure JWT tokens are securely configured and validated for incoming requests using appropriate middleware.
